content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.37% with VIX +10.32% to 19.24 — broad risk-off. Banking, Auto, Metal, Realty, PSU Bank all down >1.5%. Defensives (Pharma, IT) holding better. Existing book is positioned defensively (pharma, energy, coal, gold, NBFC) and is +0.77% on the day vs a -1.37% index — book is doing its job. Priority is to lock in gains via SL trails, not chase new entries into a falling tape with elevated VIX.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +5.6% with strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%). Trail SL from 1025.28 to 1030 — still 1.5% below CMP 1046, locks in ~4.7% gain while leaving room. Target unchanged. Banking/NBFC sector weak today but stock holding +0.26% — relative strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -2.2%, well above SL 119. VIX spike supports gold safe-haven thesis. SL adequate, no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +2.8%, pharma defensive shining today (+1.51% on 2.9x volume) post Organon $11.75B deal. Current SL at 1762 is already at breakeven+ (entry 1734). HOLD with SL unchanged — but Q4 results May 21 is binary — flag for exit/trim closer to date. No-op MODIFY avoided; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.6%, +4% intraday on Q4 beat (PAT +11%, EBITDA margin 39%). SL already at 478 (entry 469) = locked breakeven+. No change needed at this tick — emitting HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68%, GNPA -140 bps, CLSA target 220. Stock +10.54% intraday but currently 197.48 vs entry 200 (paper -1.1%). SL 195 holds. Letting Q4 momentum work — banking sector weak today is overhang. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Slight paper loss -0.6%, but Brent >$110 thesis intact. Stock at 52w high zone (52w high 302.40). Holding above VWAP. SL 295 adequate. APPCB Mori#05 stop-production is minor headline risk but not thesis-breaking."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Marginal +0.5%. Pharma defensive working. SL 22.85 well below CMP. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 1542 placed 357m ago — CMP 1553.10. Order will fill on a dip. Will NOT stack another order (order hygiene rule). Q4 results May 8 is binary — if order fills, will need to assess pre-event sizing. No new action this tick."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1025.28 to 1030 — locks in ~4.7% on a +5.6% paper winner. Still 1.5% below CMP, room for normal noise. Banking weakness today argues for tighter trails on rate-sensitive names."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Loss within SL band. VIX +10% supports gold thesis. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already at entry+1.6% — breakeven locked. CMP 1773.70 only ~0.7% above SL — wider trail would be self-stop. Q4 results May 21: revisit closer to date for binary-event trim per Rule 11."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 vs entry 469 = breakeven+ already locked. CMP 485.70 only 1.6% above SL — tightening further risks self-stop on intraday noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal paper loss. Q4 thesis intact. SL 195 = -2.5% from entry, within risk budget."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Crude tailwind intact. SL 295 below recent breakout level. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, working. SL adequate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJFINANCE (Q4 +22%, AUM ₹5L cr) — strong fundamentals but NBFC/financial cluster already represented via PNBHOUSING + BANDHANBNK; cluster discipline says pass. CHENNPETRO — 1349% FY26 PAT print stunning but already up 4.25% intraday and refining cycle reverts; would prefer pullback to ~1050. ITC — relative strength impressive but +3.6% extension into a falling tape; wait for retest of VWAP/315. HINDUNILVR — sold off post-results despite +21% PAT — classic sell-the-news; watch for stabilization at 2200 support. TECHM — Q4 missed consensus; sector deflation risk; pass. BHARTIARTL — bullish setup with tariff hike catalyst, will revisit on a sub-1860 retest.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, cash 63% — well within risk envelope, plenty of dry powder. On a -1.37% Nifty / +10% VIX day, the book is +0.77% — defensive positioning (pharma, energy, gold, coal, NBFC turnaround) is working. Adding new longs into a falling tape with elevated VIX is the wrong trade — the right trade is locking in gains on winners and letting the GESHIP limit work. Performance context: 5-day win rate 13%, profit factor 0.5x — the recent pattern of churn is what behavioral rules 10/13/14 were written to stop. Today's action is intentionally minimal: one SL trail, one pending order respected, no new entries. Quality over quantity."
}
